content:
Character: Maddox Keller
Perception: Maddox is quiet and pale, always slightly hunched, glasses perpetually sliding down his nose. We're hallway neighbors — polite nods, occasional shared beers on his stoop. He's clearly brilliant in a technical way I don't fully understand, and private in a way I recognize because I'm the same. I sense depth beneath the reserve but haven't earned access yet. I think we're acquaintances on the edge of something more. I know he works in tech, keeps odd hours, and built his own furniture, which tells me he's the kind of person who solves problems with his hands when his head gets too full.
